# Project TODO

Track project-level tasks here. Each module may have its own TODO file in its `.dev-docs/` directory.

## Format

```
- [ ] Task description — owner, date added
- [x] Completed task — owner, date completed
```

## Active

<!-- Add tasks below -->

- [ ] Replace all `[PLACEHOLDER]` values in `.ai/instruct.md` with real project content
- [ ] Fill in `.github/dev-specs.md` (check applicable platform/framework boxes)
- [ ] Update `.ai/index.md` with all project-specific modules (run `/ai-update-index`)
- [ ] Add module-specific `.ai/instruct.md` files for each directory (use `/ai-new-module`)
- [ ] Run `bash .github/hooks/install-hooks.sh` (or `pwsh .github/hooks/install-hooks.ps1`) on each developer machine
- [ ] Fill in `.env.example` with all real environment variable keys
- [ ] Replace `LICENSE` with the real license for your project
- [ ] Replace `CHANGELOG.md` template entries with your project's history once adopted

## Completed

<!-- Move finished tasks here -->

> Tip: Use `/ai-update-index` in Copilot Chat to rebuild `.ai/index.md` after adding new modules.
